forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h tending northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south from the late morning. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the morning then turning westerly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly in the early afternoon then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before turning northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before turning northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Sun protection 12:10pm to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of the ranges, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Partly cloudy. The chance of fog east of Ceduna. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. The chance of fog east of Ceduna in the early morning. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 12:00pm to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Ceduna. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before turning northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. The chance of fog near the west coast. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog near the west coast in the early morning. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before turning south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog north of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h before dawn then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog north of Oodnadatta. Medium chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h before dawn then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
